case_title: NIKOLAI KABANIAEV VS. AIG INSURANCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KABANIAEV, NIKOLAI AS TO DEFENDANT SERVICE BROS. TRANSPORT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIG INSURANCE SERVICE BROS. TRANSPORT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIG INSURANCE WAS REPRESENTED BY TOM DALNOKI--AIG INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT SERVICE BROS. TRANSPORT WAS REPRESENTED BY RUDY MENCHACA JR. EMPLOYEE AND EVA DUES--JPA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO AIG INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-18-2014 AT 10:00 AM.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,218.72 FILED BY KABANIAEV, NIKOLAI AS TO DEFENDANT AIG INSURANCE SERVICE BROS. TRANSPORT MENCHACA JR., RODOLFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KABANIAEV, NIKOLAI AS TO DEFENDANT AIG INSURANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-07-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIG INSURANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $35.00 SERVED OCT-15-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENCHACA JR., RODOLFO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KABANIAEV, NIKOLAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERVICE BROS. TRANSPORT MENCHACA JR., RODOLFO $7,218.72 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,358.72, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST AIG INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
